name: Gush Phaser
explanation: A 4-stage OTA phaser with a gushy, watery, deep sweep. Four cascaded allpass filters are swept by a triangle LFO so the notches glide up and down the spectrum (Rate sets the speed, Depth the span). A Color control feeds part of the chain output back into its input, adding bounded resonant feedback that sharpens the sweep into a vocal, gushing whoosh. Controls: Rate, Depth, Color and dry/wet Mix.
